Even though she looked _____, she spoke ______.
Never such a heinous crime _______.
‘A Pyrrhic victory’ means-
options_html: A loss disguised as a win
A victory at a great cost
correct_answer_html: A victory at a great cost

question_html: Change the narration: He said, “Let us wait and see.”
options_html: He proposed that they should wait and see.
He suggested that they should wait and see.
They argued that they should wait and see.
He opted that they will wait and see.
correct_answer_html: He proposed that they should wait and see.

question_html: Make it interrogative: “Nobody can fix it.”
options_html: Is there anybody to fix it?

question_html: “I saw him leaving the house.”- What is the passive form of the sentence?
options_html: He had been seen leaving the house.
He was seen to be leaving the house.
Leaving the house he was seen by me.
He was seen leaving the house.
correct_answer_html: He was seen leaving the house.

question_html: _______ late but also he forgot the keys.
I wish I could do it. (Make it exclamatory)
options_html: If could I do it!
Wish that could I do it!

question_html: “We were not working hard.” Here the underlined word is a/an-
The idiom ‘to drive home’ means-
options_html: To return to place of rest

question_html: “Did they watch the movie?” (Make it passive)
options_html: Was the movie watched by them?
Did the movie watch by them?
Was the movie been watched by them?
Were they watched by the movie?
correct_answer_html: Was the movie watched by them?

question_html: Only by chance _____ that she had been stealing from us.
Alif said, “Would that I could see my mother!” (Change the narration)
options_html: Alif wished that he could see his mother.
Alif hoped that he would see his mother.
Alif said that he had seen his mother.
Alif regretted that he didn’t see his mother.
correct_answer_html: Alif wished that he could see his mother.

question_html: “You should make good the loss.” Find out the appropriate meaning of the underlined word.
“This sum is as hard as that.”- What is the comparative form of the sentence?
options_html: That sum is not harder than this.
That sum is harder than this.
Those sum is harder than this.
That sum is more harder than this.
correct_answer_html: That sum is not harder than this.
